Dorothy changes into a clean gingham dress and discovers the silver shoes fit perfectly. She sets out on the Yellow Brick Road, passing prosperous Munchkin farms and receiving bows from locals.
From domestic preparation to a sense of wonder and curiosity.

Dorothy walking away along the road toward the horizon.
Dorothy prepares her appearance and begins her trek through Munchkin Country.
